---
title: "Zimuzo Obi"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: solana
listing:
  id: writings-listing
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: "DD/MM/YYYY"
  max-items: 3
  type: default
  fields: [title, date]
---

:::{#hero-heading}
Data Scientist.

I never imagined data would become my creative outlet, but somewhere between a messy spreadsheet and a uni module, I realised turning chaos into clarity isn't too bad.

My goal is simple: make life easy, learn every day, and show up with intention. This medium is for documenting my journey, sharing what I learn, and connecting with others who are on a similar path. Whether it's a new technique, a project I'm proud of, or just a thought that popped into my head, you'll find it here.

To get in contact, you can send an [email](mailto:obizimuzo@gmail.com), connect with me on [linkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zimobi/){target="_blank"}, or see my code contributions on [github](https://github.com/0xzim){target="_blank"}

<!-- :::

## Projects
[Machine Learning Projects](https://github.com/0xzim/ml-challenges){target="_blank"}

[Cyclistic Analysis](https://0xzim.github.io/cyclistic/){target="_blank"}

[Export Performance Analysis](https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiNGFiZWJlODItMWVmMi00YzI1LWFlMzgtMjAwM2JiYzczN2Y1IiwidCI6IjBiOGEyNWY5LTg3ZWItNDAzYi04OWU0LTJhNTZlMjJhZGUzYSJ9){target="_blank"} -->

:::

##### **Latest Writings:**

:::{#writings-listing}
:::
[View all writings →](blog.qmd)
